name: Star Mica Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Star Mica Holdings Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, acquires, renovates, manages, rents, and sells pre-owned condominiums in Japan. The company also provides brokerage services for pre-owned condominium units and other real estate properties; consulting services; and real estate planning and leasing management services. In addition, it offers private banking and investment advisory services. Star Mica Holdings Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
